description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 건축의 교차점에 대한 탐구로, FLORA-9이 코드와 엽록소로 구성된 지각 있는 생태계로서 번성하는 모습을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: An exploration of the intersection between organic life and digital architecture, where FLORA-9 thrives as a sentient ecosystem of code and chlorophyll.

prompt: A high-tech bioluminescent garden featuring the FLORA-9 entity, translucent glass petals with glowing fiber-optic veins, holographic butterflies flickering between floating data streams, hyper-realistic 8k resolution, vibrant emerald and electric violet color palette, surreal digital landscape where nature and code merge.
